---
title: "Margaret Oliphant Oliphant"
---

## Margaret Oliphant Oliphant

**Dates:** (1828-1897)

**Maiden name:** (Wilson)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891)

### Letters

- Letter from November 19, 1897.
- Letter from Jan 31st 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
